headline: 3 Beaten-Down Dividend Aristocrats to Scoop Up While Wall Street Chases AI Stocks Into a Cliff
summary: Wall Street has gotten far more selective on AI stocks, but these AI stocks are still receiving the lion’s share of invested capital. Dividend Aristocrat stocks like PepsiCo (NASDAQ:PEP), Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL), and Beckton Dickinson (NYSE:BDX) are neglected, and that’s exactly why it’s worth chasing them right now. A portion of investors have already started ... 3 Beaten-Down Dividend Aristocrats to Scoop Up While Wall Street Chases AI Stocks Into a Cliff

headline: Can Hormel Foods' International & Foodservice Offset Retail Weakness?
summary: HRL balances Retail weakness with gains in Foodservice and International, reflecting uneven segment performance.

headline: o9 Goes Live at Hormel Foods to Modernize Planning Across the Company’s Global Supply Chain Network
summary: DALLAS, March 25, 2026--o9, a leading software company that is powering enterprise planning and decisioning models across 30-plus industry verticals with its groundbreaking, AI-powered Digital Brain platform, today announced the successful go-live of integrated Demand and Supply Planning capabilities at Hormel Foods Corporation. The integration of the AI-powered digital platform is the latest investment by Hormel Foods, a Fortune 500 global branded food company, to strengthen operational efficie
